tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive returned 0 with --git-host other + fake URL; no abort on push failure

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh: '[OK] Context7 MCP installed' + '[OK] Context7 MCP configured'; 53 checks passed

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 verified)

documentation_gaps.gap: init.sh --git-host other does not write the host field into .claude/manifest.json. Downstream check-gate.sh --preflight then fails with 'manifest.json missing host field' until --backfill-host is run interactively. This is friction for non-interactive UAT and any scripted workflow.

scripts/check-gate.sh --backfill-host requires interactive y/N confirmation. With no stdin, it silently aborts (prints 'Inferred host ...' but never asks, never writes). Consider adding --yes/--non-interactive flag or auto-confirming when run by CI.

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed sequentially

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-gate.sh --preflight fails with 'Not ready: protection verification failed' against fake remote — expected behavior since example.com cannot have branch protection. Considered N/A for fake-remote UAT context, not a regression.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D confirmation: no script auto-advances .current_phase after gate passes. Had to manually jq-edit phase-state.json to proceed.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all phase1_architecture steps; run check-phase-gate.sh; observe .current_phase remains 0
framework_bugs.expected: Some script (process-checklist or check-phase-gate) bumps .current_phase from 0 to 1 (etc.) after gate prerequisites met
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase remains at its prior value; no advancement script exists. grep across scripts/ finds only readers of current_phase, no writers (other than init.sh which sets it to 0).

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop steps (tests_written -> documentation_updated) completed sequentially; security_audit gate accepted feature-named audit file

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): ...' succeeded after build loop completion (commit 07508da)

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: direct shell git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' SUCCEEDED (commit fd317bd) — bypasses BL-006 because PreToolUse hook is not invoked when not running through Claude Code. Pre-commit-gate.sh would block this command if invoked via the hook path.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, --start-feature 'uat-feat-2' succeeded (PR #17 grace window reset works)

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: With valid .claude/pending-approval.json (question/options/recommendation/offered_at), pre-commit-gate.sh on stdin PreToolUse JSON returned permissionDecision: deny with rich reason

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; subsequent commit attempt got past BL-015 (then blocked by BL-006 for unrelated reason — no active build loop, which is correct)

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006
framework_bugs.reproduction: git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' (without --start-feature, outside Claude Code)
framework_bugs.expected: Some commit-msg hook or git pre-commit hook blocks feat: commits with no recorded Build Loop
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeded (sha fd317bd). BL-006 is enforced only via PreToolUse pre-commit-gate.sh, which is not invoked from a plain shell. No git-side hook is installed by init.sh.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 returned 0 (after manual phase advance to 3 due to U-D)

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh exists and runs (returns 1 with placeholder violations on the unpopulated tests/uat/templates/test-session-template.html, which is expected — no populated UAT scenario was generated in this UAT run, so a true clean lint is N/A. The script itself is operational per PR #17).

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: All 9 phase3_validation steps completed sequentially with stub artifacts (semgrep_pass.json, integration, accessibility, performance, contract, chaos, legal). check-phase-gate.sh emits warnings about review-manifest and tools but exits 0.

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: All 6 PHASE4_STEPS (production_build, rollback_tested, go_live_verified, monitoring_configured, handoff_written, handoff_tested) completed sequentially with stub artifacts

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: phase4_release:handoff_written gate fired (printed warning to create HANDOFF.md before stub created); after stubbing HANDOFF.md the step completed

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: phase4_release:go_live_verified gate fired (warning to create RELEASE_NOTES.md); after stubbing RELEASE_NOTES.md the step completed

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: .current_phase = 4 (manually advanced; per U-D, no script advances). phase4_release.steps_completed has all 6 items.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git grep for password|api_key|secret|token returned only references in .github/workflows (templated GH Actions secrets), .claude/framework/hooks/known-stdlib.txt (Python secrets module), and CI documentation comments — no actual credentials

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: .claude/process-audit.log not present — no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run, so the log absence is correct (N/A)

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged from setup). git status --short shows only untracked .claude/ (pre-existing) and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ (this report's destination); no tracked files were modified.

summary: Base/personal/mobile/full ran end-to-end via init.sh --non-interactive (PR #19 / U-A fix verified); BL-015 sentinel block+resolve, framework-self guard, U-H pending-approval/lint-uat helpers, and PR #17 BL-006 grace-window reset all confirmed. U-C and U-D re-confirmed as still-open prior-sweep bugs (Medium). No new Critical/High regressions; two doc gaps logged about init.sh not writing manifest.host and check-gate.sh --backfill-host being interactive-only.
